## Bug description
Clearly describe the issue you encountered.

---

---

## Expected behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

---

Describe what actually happened.

---

```text
<logs>
```

---

## Environment

- Python version:

- Git commit / branch:

---

## Additional context
Screenshots, figures, stack traces, or dataset excerpts that may help diagnose the issue.
